questions.question: Describe the primary difference between contiguous memory allocation and non-contiguous memory allocation. Explain how contiguous memory allocation is used in real-world scenarios.
questions.hint: Focus on the implications of contiguous allocation on system performance

questions.question: What is the purpose of a page table in virtual memory management? Explain the benefits of using a page table over other memory management techniques.
questions.hint: Elaborate on the trade-offs between page tables and other memory management strategies

questions.question: Explain the concept of paging and segmentation in memory management. How do these techniques differ in terms of memory usage and performance?
questions.hint: Compare the advantages and disadvantages of each technique
